task: I’m working on a school robotics thing and need to write a short intro for my part. The group is keeping the final presentation brief, so I want something that clearly says what I handled without turning it into a whole speech.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, clear intro you can use:

**“For my part of the project, I worked on [your task]. I was responsible for [what you did], and I helped make sure [result/outcome].”**

If you want, I can also turn this into:
- a **more casual version**
- a **more formal presentation version**
- or help you fill it in with your exact job on the robotics project.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, but I need it filled in, not a template. I did most of the coding, basically the control sequence, and made sure the robot finished the course cleanly. Keep it short and not cringey.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, natural version:

**“I handled most of the coding, especially the control sequence, and made sure the robot could finish the course cleanly.”**

If you want, I can make it sound a little more **formal** or even more **casual**.
